---
output: github_document
bibliography: publications.bib
csl: harvard-cite-them-right-no-et-al.csl
nocite: '@*'
---

*A full list is also available on my [website](https://gillianmchugo.github.io) and [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6920-0041).*

```{r, include = F}
# Install and load package
if (!require(stringi)) install.packages("stringi")
library(stringi)

# Read, edit and write README
README <- readLines("publications.md")

README <- stri_replace_all_regex(
  README,
  pattern = c("McHugo, G.P.",
              "McHugo, G. ",
              "McHugo, G.,",
              "Bos",
              "indicus",
              "taurus",
              "Mycobacterium",
              "bovis",
              "tuberculosis",
              "Mytilus",
              "edulis",
              "et al"),
  replacement = c("**McHugo, G.P.**",
                  "**McHugo, G.** ",
                  "**McHugo, G.**,",
                  "*Bos*",
                  "*indicus*",
                  "*taurus*",
                  "*Mycobacterium*",
                  "*bovis*",
                  "*tuberculosis*",
                  "*Mytilus*",
                  "*edulis*",
                  "*et al*"),
  vectorize = F)

writeLines(README, "README.md")
```
